title: Ecco
writer: Gianni Proia, Ugo Liberatore, Francesco Mazzei
plot: A documentary highlighting some of the oddest, strangest and more grotesque examples of human behavior. Included are a tour of the Grand Guignol theater in Paris, a man who sticks long needles through his body, footage of reindeer...
language: Italian, Portuguese, English, French, Japanese, Latin
